validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address (it must include @ and a domain, e.g. name@example.com).

home.title: Portfolio X-Ray Generator
home.subtitle: Generate Morningstar X-Ray reports for your portfolio. Enter ISINs or Morningstar IDs and get instant analysis.
home.urlParseError: Could not load portfolio from URL. Please add assets manually.

xray.title: X-Ray Generated
xray.subtitle: Your Morningstar X-Ray report is ready. Open the PDF or share the link with others.
xray.noPortfolioData: No portfolio data found in URL.

shareCard.title: Shareable Link
shareCard.description: Share this link to recreate the portfolio

portfolio.noAssetsHint: Enter an ISIN, Morningstar ID, or ticker above to get started.

assetInput.placeholder: Enter ISIN, Morningstar ID, or ticker (e.g., IE00B4L5Y983)
assetInput.duplicateError: This asset is already in your portfolio
assetInput.emptyError: Please enter an ISIN, Morningstar ID, or ticker

shareable.title: Shareable Link
shareable.description: Share this link to recreate the portfolio

allocation.amountInfoBody: In Amount mode we automatically calculate percentages from the total amount you enter. When you share or explore public portfolios we only show percentages, never the raw amounts. Your original amounts are saved and only visible to you in the portfolio builder.

clearConfirm.title: Clear All Assets
clearConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to clear all assets? This action cannot be undone.

manualInput.title: Manual Asset Entry for "{identifier}"
manualInput.description: The asset could not be resolved automatically. Please enter the Morningstar details manually.
manualInput.assetNamePlaceholder: e.g., iShares Core MSCI World UCITS ETF

alternatives.confirmSingle: Please confirm this is the correct asset:
alternatives.selectFromList: Please select the correct asset from the list below:

editableIsin.saveError: Failed to save ISIN. Please try again.

metadata.title: Portfolio X-Ray Generator
metadata.description: Generate Morningstar X-Ray reports for your investment portfolio. Enter ISINs, tickers, or Morningstar IDs and get instant portfolio analysis.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Portfolio X-Ray helps you generate Morningstar X-Ray reports for your investment portfolios. If you have feedback, ideas, or questions about the product, you can reach out using the form below.
contact.successMessage: Your message has been sent. I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorGeneric: We could not send your message. Please try again in a moment.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailMessage: If an account exists with {email}, we've sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: Invalid reset link. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create your account
register.userNameHint: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
register.name: Full name
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.emailSendFailedMessage: Could not send verification email automatically. Please register again to receive a new verification email.

verifyEmailPending.title: Verify your email
verifyEmailPending.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to your email address
verifyEmailPending.registrationSuccess: Please check your email to verify your account.
verifyEmailPending.verificationFailedMessage: A new verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox.
verifyEmailPending.instructions: Please check your email inbox and click on the verification link we sent you. This link will expire in 24 hours.
verifyEmailPending.checkSpam: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
verifyEmailPending.expiryNotice: The verification link expires in 24 hours.
verifyEmailPending.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now use all features of Portfolio X-Ray.
verifyEmail.verificationFailedUsed: The verification token has already been used
verifyEmail.alreadyVerified: Your email was already verified. Welcome back.
verifyEmail.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment before trying again.

savePortfolio.title: Save portfolio
savePortfolio.isPublicHint: Public portfolios can be discovered by others
savePortfolio.saveError: Failed to save portfolio. Please try again.
savePortfolio.saveChangesModeTitle: How do you want to save your changes?
savePortfolio.saveChangesModeDescription: You can update the current portfolio with these changes or create a new portfolio from them.

portfolios.title: My portfolios
portfolios.empty: You have no saved portfolios yet.
portfolios.signInToViewPortfolios: Sign in to view your portfolios.
portfolios.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the portfolio "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
portfolios.exploreSubtitle: Discover public portfolios created by other users and open them in the builder.
portfolios.noPublicPortfolios: No public portfolios found for these filters.
portfolios.noFavorites: You have no favorite portfolios yet.
portfolios.signInToViewFavorites: Sign in to view your favorites.
portfolios.removeFromFavoritesConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}" from favorites?
portfolios.portfolioUnavailable: This portfolio is no longer available.

authModal.title: Sign in or register
authModal.verifyEmailMessage: We've sent a verification link to your email.
authModal.verifyEmailHint: After verifying, you can save your portfolio from the builder.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.name: Full name
profile.userNameHint: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.setPasswordHint: You signed in with Google. You can set a password here to also sign in with email.
profile.setPasswordSuccess: Password set successfully. You can now sign in with email and password.
profile.signInToViewProfile: Sign in to view your profile.
profile.deleteAccountMessage: If you delete your account, you will permanently lose access to your saved portfolios and any associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: All your portfolios will stop being visible to anyone and your personal data will be anonymized, but some technical records may remain for internal purposes.
profile.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete your account. Please try again.

comments.title: Comments
comments.placeholder: Write a comment about this portfolio...
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to comment.
comments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action cannot be undone.
comments.loginRequiredShort: You must sign in to comment.
comments.loginHint: When you continue the sign-in/registration popup will open; your comment will not be lost.
